overview.description: The FT Vest International Equity Moderate Buffer ETF - December (YDEC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the EFA ETF over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. YDEC was launched on Dec 18, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
